---
title: "A teaching concept about replicable data analysis now published!"
date: 2024-04-23
subtitle: "by OSC members Max Mandl, Sabine Hoffmann, and Anne-Laure Boulesteix"
categories: ["Publications"]
---


<p>OSC members <a href="/people/people/anne-laure-boulesteix.qmd" title="Boulesteix">Anne-Laure Boulesteix</a>, <a href="/people/people/maximilian-mandl.qmd" title="Mandl">Max Mandl</a> and <a href="/people/people/sabine-hoffmann.qmd" title="Hoffmann">Sabine Hoffmann</a> are authors of the paper <strong>"Raising awareness of uncertain choices in empirical data analysis: A teaching concept toward replicable research practices"</strong> (<a href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1011936">https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1011936</a>) published in PLOS Computational Biology. The education paper presents a teaching concept to help students to recognize the impact of their analytical choices and to learn strategies to handle these choices transparently.</p>
<p>Their work has party been funded by an individual DFG project.</p>
<p> </p>
<p> </p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
